summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rubaru partner health journey app. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), frontend core features working with some navigation issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard page fails to load after onboarding completion - timeout waiting for h1 element
Mobile navigation buttons not clickable - element not visible

integration_issues.issue: Users may get stuck after completing onboarding - dashboard doesn't load properly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Rubaru branding
New API endpoints: cycle tracking, workout rescheduling, ingredient analysis, milestones, insights, meal swap, quick workout
Weekly Plan page with ingredient scanner modal
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dashboard loading issue after onboarding completion. Users cannot access main dashboard functionality. Also fix mobile navigation visibility issues.
